About Me

Crafting Experiences Through Code

I'm a 4th-year B.Tech Information Technology student at Malla Reddy Engineering College, Hyderabad, with a CGPA of 7.76. I specialize in building end-to-end web applications that blend clean architecture with real-world impact.

From hackathon platforms handling event ticketing to dropout prediction systems powered by machine learning, I love solving complex problems with elegant solutions. I've deployed production-ready applications integrating OAuth, payment gateways, RESTful APIs, and ML models.

Currently exploring opportunities in Full Stack Development — building, learning, and shipping every day.

MERN Stack ML Integration OAuth 2.0 Cloud Platforms DSA REST APIs CI/CD

Featured Work

Production-Ready Projects

End-to-end applications built, deployed, and live — not just portfolio pieces.

🏆
Hackly
Full Stack Hackathon Management Platform

A production-ready MERN platform enabling hackathon organizers to manage events end-to-end — from registration to analytics — with seamless payment integration and secure auth.

Google OAuth 2.0 via Passport.js for secure login
Razorpay payment gateway for ticket purchases
Organizer dashboards with participant analytics
GitHub-based CI/CD on Vercel + Render
React.js Node.js MongoDB Express.js OAuth 2.0 Razorpay Vercel Render
🔗 View Live Demo →
🎓
EduGuard
Student Dropout Prediction & Counseling System

A role-based educational platform with ML-powered dropout risk detection. Enables institutions to proactively identify at-risk students and trigger counseling workflows before it's too late.

ML models predicting dropout risk from attendance & grades
Admin, Teacher, Student role-based portals with RBAC
JWT-based authentication with secure access control
Counseling workflows, retention analytics, placement tracking
React.js Node.js MongoDB JWT RBAC Machine Learning REST API
